notes: Day 21 (Mar 20 = NOWRUZ) UPDATE 12:15AM ET. Sources: CNN D20, AJ liveblog D20, ToI liveblog D20, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, Azernews, Yahoo News, DevDiscourse, LasSun, Time, Britannica, Haaretz.

SAMREF REFINERY HIT — IRGC NAMED TARGET EXECUTED: Saudi Arabia confirmed drone hit SAMREF refinery in Yanbu on Red Sea coast — Saudi Aramco/ExxonMobil JV. Saudi Defense Ministry: damage assessment underway. Aramco says 'impact minimal.' CRITICAL: SAMREF was specifically NAMED by IRGC as target on D19. This is the FIRST named target on the RED SEA coast — meaning IRGC drones have now reached BOTH sides of Saudi Arabia. IRGC executing its target list systematically: Kuwait 2 refineries ✓, Qatar LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.

NOWRUZ — DAY 21 = PERSIAN NEW YEAR: War enters 4th week on Nowruz (March 20). No ceasefire — Iran FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for a ceasefire.' Mojtaba Khamenei condition uncertain — may not deliver traditional Nowruz message. If absent: signals significant power vacuum. Pahlavi calls Iranians to celebrate Nowruz as 'national solidarity.' Potential for internal unrest if gatherings evolve into protests — war + domestic crisis converging.

6TH MISSILE SALVO AT ISRAEL: ToI reports Iran launched 6th missile salvo at Israel since midnight on March 19. Continued cluster munitions. Multiple salvos = Iran maintaining pressure on Israel despite depleted missile stocks.

OIL PULLING BACK FROM $114 PEAK: Brent overnight showing pullback from $114.13 evening high. Multiple sources showing ~$110-112 range. EIA forecast: Brent >$95 next 2 months, <$80 Q3 if conflict winds down. Citi maintains $120+ near-term. Market digesting Kuwait refinery + Qatar LNG + SAMREF — supply crunch vs SPR release. WTI ~$95.
TRUMP CLARIFIES SOUTH PARS: Israel won't re-strike South Pars gas field. BUT US will 'completely blow up' South Pars if Qatar attacked again. Distinguishing US from Israeli energy targeting.
RAFAH CROSSING REOPENED: First time since Feb 28. Egypt state media confirmed. Gaza humanitarian corridor reopening amid wider war.

IRAN REJECTS ALL CEASEFIRE: FM Araghchi: 'No, we never asked for a ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation. We are ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Senior official to Al-Mayadeen: 'no scenario for a ceasefire.' Time: 'The United States Must Be Held Accountable.'
LEBANON ~970+ KILLED: Health Ministry (Mar 18): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Ground ops continue south of Litani.
D20 REVISED: SAMREF hit added — missiles 40→45 (SAMREF ballistic), drones 75→80 (SAMREF drone). Cumul revised up.
IMO EMERGENCY: UN maritime body council could vote on safe corridor resolution. 40-member council. Practical measures to evacuate stranded ships/seafarers.

MACRON CALLS FOR ENERGY MORATORIUM: Spoke with Trump and Qatari emir — calling for moratorium on strikes targeting civilian infrastructure. First major Western leader to frame energy targeting as separate issue.

theoryBox: Day 21 — NOWRUZ UNDER FIRE / IRGC EXECUTING TARGET LIST: SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC's NAMED target now struck. Target list execution: Kuwait 2 refineries ✓, Qatar LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. Brent ~$112 (pulling back from $114). Nowruz — no ceasefire, Mojtaba uncertain, Pahlavi calls solidarity. Iran FM: 'never asked for ceasefire.' 6th salvo at Israel. Lebanon ~970+. Rafah reopened. Macron calls energy moratorium. IRGC systematically destroying Gulf energy infrastructure while rejecting all diplomacy.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۲۱ — نوروز زیر آتش / سپاه لیست اهداف: سامرف (ینبع) حمله. لیست: کویت ✓، قطر ✓، سامرف ✓. باقی: جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن. نفت ~۱۱۲. نوروز بدون آتش‌بس. عراقچی: 'هرگز درخواست نکردیم.' مجتبی نامعلوم. پهلوی: همبستگی. لبنان ~۹۷۰+. رفح باز. ماکرون: توقف انرژی. سپاه تخریب سیستماتیک.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: NOWRUZ UNDER FIRE. SAMREF hit — IRGC named target executed. Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. No ceasefire. Mojtaba uncertain. Internet 260+ hrs.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: D21 est: 35. D20 REVISED UP to 45 (SAMREF ballistic + 6th salvo at Israel). IRGC maintaining missile pressure despite depletion. 6+ salvos at Israel in single day. SAMREF = Red Sea coast now in range.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: D21 est: 60. D20 REVISED UP to 80 (SAMREF drone confirmed). IRGC drone range now proven across BOTH coasts of Saudi Arabia — Gulf AND Red Sea. Systematic infrastructure targeting.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: Pulling back from $114 evening peak. Overnight ~$110-112. Citi: $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months. SAMREF hit + continued supply disruption. Macron calls energy moratorium. Market volatile.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: No 6th Hengaw report. Extrapolated: 5,300+ (D18) + continued strikes D19-D21. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. HRANA: 3,114. Internet blackout 260+ hrs. Nowruz under bombardment.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Approaching/crossing 1,000 with D20-D21 strikes. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Ground ops south of Litani. Bridges targeted.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: 6th missile salvo since midnight D20. Cluster munitions continue. 3,727+ wounded. Interceptor crisis persists.

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: IAEA: 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons. Isfahan underground status unknown. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Iran rejects ALL diplomacy — 'never asked for ceasefire.' Nuclear transparency = zero.

metrics_fa.label: روز
metrics_fa.desc: نوروز زیر آتش. سامرف حمله. لیست سپاه اجرا. آتش‌بس: نه. مجتبی نامعلوم.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: D21: ۳۵. D20 بازنگری ۴۵. سامرف بالستیک. ۶ حمله اسرائیل. ساحل دریای سرخ.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد
metrics_fa.desc: D21: ۶۰. D20 بازنگری ۸۰. سامرف پهپاد. هر دو ساحل عربستان.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: عقب‌نشینی از ۱۱۴. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. EIA: ۹۵+. سامرف + بحران عرضه. ماکرون: توقف انرژی.

metrics_fa.label: کشته ایران
metrics_fa.desc: برآورد. هنگاو ۶ هنوز. وزارت: ۱,۴۴۴. اینترنت ۲۶۰+ ساعت. نوروز زیر بمباران.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: وزارت: ۹۶۸ + ادامه. ۱ میلیون آواره. عملیات زمینی. لیطانی.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح. اصفهان ناشناخته. ایران: 'هرگز درخواست نکردیم.' شفافیت = صفر.

sitrep: SAMREF REFINERY HIT — IRGC NAMED TARGET EXECUTED: Saudi Arabia confirmed drone struck SAMREF refinery in Yanbu on Red Sea coast (Saudi Aramco/ExxonMobil JV, ~400K bbl/day capacity). Saudi Defense Ministry: damage assessment underway. Aramco says 'impact minimal.' CRITICAL: SAMREF was SPECIFICALLY NAMED by IRGC as target on D19. This is the FIRST strike on Saudi Red Sea coast — IRGC drones now reaching BOTH sides of Saudi Arabia. Target execution scorecard: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi ✓, Kuwait Mina Abdullah ✓, Qatar several LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining named: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.

NOWRUZ — WAR ENTERS 4TH WEEK ON PERSIAN NEW YEAR: March 20 = Nowruz. No ceasefire — Iran FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for a ceasefire.' Mojtaba Khamenei condition uncertain — may not deliver traditional Nowruz message. If absent: signals power vacuum deepening. Pahlavi calls on Iranians to celebrate as 'national solidarity.' Potential for internal unrest if gatherings become protests. War + Nowruz + domestic crisis = triple pressure on IRGC.

OIL VOLATILE — BRENT ~$112: Pulling back from D20 evening $114.13 peak. Overnight ~$110-112. Citi maintains $120+ near-term forecast. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months, <$80 Q3 if conflict ends. SAMREF hit keeps supply anxiety elevated. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG + SAMREF = IRGC systematically degrading Gulf refining/export capacity. Jones Act waived 60 days.

6TH MISSILE SALVO AT ISRAEL: ToI reports Iran launched 6th missile salvo at Israel since midnight on March 19. Continued cluster munitions across central Israel. Multiple salvos = Iran maintaining pressure despite missile depletion narrative. Israel interceptor crisis persists (Semafor).

IRAN REJECTS ALL DIPLOMACY: FM Araghchi: 'No, we never asked for a ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation. We are ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Senior official to Al-Mayadeen: 'no scenario for a ceasefire.' Time: 'The United States Must Be Held Accountable.' This eliminates diplomatic off-ramp for foreseeable future.

MACRON CALLS ENERGY MORATORIUM: French president spoke with Trump and Qatari emir — calling for moratorium on strikes targeting civilian energy infrastructure. First major Western leader to separate energy targeting from military operations. Diplomatic significance: could build framework for energy de-escalation even without broader ceasefire.

TRUMP CLARIFIES SOUTH PARS: Israel won't re-strike South Pars gas field. BUT US will 'completely blow up' South Pars if Qatar attacked again. Creates escalatory trigger: next IRGC missile at Qatar = US strikes on Iran's largest gas field.
RAFAH CROSSING REOPENED: First time since Feb 28. Egyptian state media confirmed. Gaza humanitarian corridor reopening. Suggests Egypt negotiating separately from broader conflict.

KUWAIT REFINERIES — AFTERMATH: Mina al-Ahmadi (730K bbl/day) fire contained by KPC. Mina Abdullah also hit. Combined ~1.4M bbl/day at risk. Kuwait most affected Gulf state by industrial damage. 26+ Hezbollah operatives detained.

LEBANON ~1,000 KILLED: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Now likely crossing 1,000 with continued strikes. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Ground ops south of Litani. German chancellor: ground invasion an 'error.'

IRAN: Internet blackout 260+ hours. Swedish execution diplomatic fallout. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali + Shahin Shahr + Tehran. Nowruz under bombardment — unprecedented in modern Iranian history.
sitrep_fa: سامرف (ینبع) حمله — هدف نام‌برده سپاه: پهپاد آرامکو/اکسون. دریای سرخ = هر دو ساحل. لیست: کویت ✓ قطر ✓ سامرف ✓. جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن باقی.
نوروز — جنگ هفته ۴: آتش‌بس نه. عراقچی: 'هرگز.' مجتبی نامعلوم. پهلوی: همبستگی. اعتراض داخلی؟
نفت ~۱۱۲: عقب‌نشینی از ۱۱۴. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. سامرف + بحران عرضه.
۶ حمله موشکی اسرائیل از نیمه‌شب. خوشه‌ای. بحران رهگیر.
ایران: 'هرگز آتش‌بس نخواستیم.' هیچ مذاکره‌ای. راه دیپلماتیک بسته.
ماکرون: توقف حمله انرژی. ترامپ + امیر قطر. چارچوب جدا از آتش‌بس؟
ترامپ: اسرائیل پارس جنوبی نه. اما آمریکا اگر قطر = بله.
رفح باز — اولین بار از ۲۸ فوریه.
کویت پالایشگاه‌ها — مینا الاحمدی مهار. ۲۶+ حزب‌الله.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D21: fragment est. D20 REVISED UP: SAMREF refinery (Yanbu) hit — ballistic+drone confirmed. D21 PRELIMINARY: Nowruz day, IRGC maintaining pressure. Target list execution: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓.

oil.note: Full daily series. D21 (NOWRUZ): Brent ~$112 — pulling back from D20 evening $114.13 peak (CNBC). Overnight volatile $110-112 range. SAMREF hit keeping supply anxiety elevated. Citi: $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months, <$80 Q3 if conflict ends. WTI ~$95. Macron calling energy moratorium. Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG + SAMREF = IRGC systematically degrading Gulf capacity. Ras Tanura restart overwhelmed. Hormuz: 21 tankers since war vs 100+/day pre-war.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 20 (D21) preliminary estimate. NOWRUZ. SAMREF (Yanbu) hit late D20 — first Red Sea coast target. Continued Gulf + Israel attacks. Iran FM: no ceasefire ever. 6th salvo at Israel. Macron moratorium call.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. 6 salvos at Israel since midnight = maintaining pressure. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali warships destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $114+ (CNBC +6.3%), closed ~$114. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached. Gabbard contradicts Trump. Kent FBI probe. Saudi FM 'trust shattered.' Pezeshkian resignation crisis. Swedish execution. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets are being systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones can reach Saudi Arabia's western export infrastructure, not just Gulf-facing facilities. This means pipeline bypass routes (East-West Pipeline to Yanbu) are no longer safe. The energy war has NO geographic limit within Saudi Arabia. Combined with Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = comprehensive assault on Gulf energy architecture.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ — DAY 21: Persian New Year under fire. No ceasefire — Araghchi: 'never asked.' Mojtaba uncertain — may miss Nowruz message. Pahlavi calls solidarity. SAMREF aftermath. Continued Gulf + Israel attacks. Macron calls energy moratorium. Trump: US will hit South Pars if Qatar attacked. Rafah crossing reopened.
dailyRows.capability: D21 PRELIMINARY: 35+65. NOWRUZ does not pause IRGC operations. Iran FM rejects all diplomacy permanently. Mojtaba's absence from Nowruz message = power vacuum signal. IRGC operating independently of any civilian authority. Target execution: 4 of 7 named targets hit in 48 hours.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$112 (pulling back from $114). Macron energy moratorium = new diplomatic track possible. Trump South Pars trigger = next Qatar attack → US destroys Iran's largest gas field. Rafah reopened = Egypt separate negotiation. Lebanon crossing 1,000 killed. Internet 260+ hours. Nowruz under bombardment — cultural trauma.
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ PARADOX: Persian New Year should be moment of reflection/renewal — instead: war week 4, no ceasefire, IRGC dictatorship, Mojtaba possibly injured, 5,400+ dead, internet dark 11+ days. Pahlavi's call to celebrate = potential internal pressure. IRGC must manage Nowruz gatherings + war simultaneously. Macron moratorium + Trump South Pars trigger = two new diplomatic frameworks emerging even as IRGC rejects all talks. If Mojtaba fails to appear: succession crisis DURING Nowruz = maximum internal instability.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: IRGC EXECUTING TARGET LIST: Named targets hit systematically — Kuwait 2 refineries ✓, Qatar LNG ✓, SAMREF (Yanbu, Red Sea) ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. Brent $107→$114→$112. NOWRUZ (Mar 20) under fire — no ceasefire, Mojtaba uncertain. Iran FM: 'never asked for ceasefire.' Macron calls energy moratorium. Trump: US hits South Pars if Qatar attacked. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 10 weapons. Lebanon crossing 1,000 killed. SAMREF = Red Sea coast reached = East-West Pipeline bypass no longer safe.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets = critical: Jubail (world's largest industrial city), Mesaieed (Qatar petrochemicals), Al Hosn (UAE gas). If struck: Brent $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, total Gulf shutdown. Nowruz aftermath — did Mojtaba appear? Internal unrest? Macron moratorium — does energy de-escalation framework emerge? Trump South Pars trigger active. US missile resupply crisis. Lebanon Litani operation. Congress $200B+ supplemental fight.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC target execution vs Gulf defenses + Macron moratorium framework; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Political — IRGC dictatorship + Mojtaba uncertainty + post-Nowruz unrest? US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes or collapses.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC completes target list: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If post-Nowruz internal pressure builds: IRGC faces two-front challenge (war + domestic). Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Saudi military entry decision. Mojtaba's condition / Nowruz message. Post-Nowruz internal unrest. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. US missile resupply. Isfahan nuclear. Congress $200B+. Lebanon Litani. Caspian escalation.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: سپاه لیست اجرا: کویت ✓ قطر ✓ سامرف ✓. جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن باقی. نوروز زیر آتش. عراقچی: 'هرگز.' ماکرون: توقف انرژی. نفت ۱۱۲. لبنان ۱,۰۰۰+.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: اهداف باقی = حیاتی. جبیل = نفت ۱۳۰+. نوروز: مجتبی؟ اعتراض؟ ماکرون = چارچوب؟ کنگره ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: انرژی + هسته‌ای + سیاسی. موشک آمریکا محدود. هرمز رسمی یا فروپاشی.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: سپاه لیست کامل = بازسازی دائمی. نوروز = فشار داخلی؟ هسته‌ای دهه.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن. عربستان. مجتبی. نوروز اعتراض. ماکرون. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. موشک. اصفهان. کنگره. لبنان. خزر.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 45%. SAMREF hit = IRGC executing named target list systematically. Red Sea coast now in range = Saudi East-West Pipeline bypass compromised. 4 of 7 named targets hit in 48 hours. If Jubail/Mesaieed/Al Hosn struck: Brent $130+, Saudi military entry. Trump South Pars trigger = next Qatar attack → US destroys Iran's largest gas field. Iran FM permanently rejects ceasefire. Macron moratorium unlikely to restrain IRGC. Every trajectory points toward widening.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 20%. SAMREF + target list execution = IRGC escalating, not settling. For attrition: IRGC must pause target list after SAMREF. Possible if: Macron moratorium gains traction + US restraint on South Pars + Gulf defenses improve. But Araghchi's 'never asked for ceasefire' makes this less likely.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 16%. SAMREF hit + target list execution = war visibly WIDENING. Exit narrative has zero credibility while named targets are being systematically struck. Brent $112. Johnson's 'objectives met' + Gabbard testimony = political pressure, but events overwhelm narrative.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 12%. Macron energy moratorium = FIRST concrete diplomatic framework beyond general 'ceasefire' calls. Separating energy from military = potentially actionable. IMO corridor vote. Rafah reopened = separate tracks possible. BUT: Iran FM 'never asked for ceasefire' + IRGC dictatorship = no Iranian partner. Most likely form: unilateral energy de-escalation or maritime corridor.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC formalization
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED but NOWRUZ adds variable. Mojtaba's failure to appear for Nowruz message = succession crisis on national holiday. Pahlavi's solidarity call = organized opposition pressure. Pezeshkian resignation still unconfirmed. IRGC controlling everything but internal legitimacy eroding. Nowruz gatherings → protests = wild card.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Araghchi: 'We never asked for ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation.' Definitive rejection. IRGC dictatorship = no civilian partner. Only backdoor: Macron moratorium framework evolving into broader arrangement. Extremely unlikely in near term.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. سامرف = لیست اجرا. دریای سرخ. ۴ از ۷ هدف. جبیل = ۱۳۰+. ترامپ پارس جنوبی = ماشه.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. سامرف + لیست = تشدید. ماکرون؟ اما عراقچی: 'هرگز.'

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. سامرف = جنگ گسترده‌تر. خروج بی‌اعتبار.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. ماکرون = چارچوب اولین. IMO. رفح. اما ایران: نه.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: رسمی‌سازی سپاه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: نوروز: مجتبی؟ پهلوی: همبستگی. تظاهرات = کارت بدون‌برنامه.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRGC target list execution — systematic industrial destruction
theoryEvaluation.body: SAMREF hit on D20 confirms pattern: IRGC is systematically executing the target list it announced on D19. Scorecard: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi ✓, Kuwait Mina Abdullah ✓, Qatar 'several' LNG ✓, SAMREF (Yanbu) ✓. Remaining named: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. CRITICAL: SAMREF is on Saudi Arabia's RED SEA coast — meaning IRGC drones have range to reach the western side of the Arabian Peninsula. This compromises the East-West Pipeline bypass (5M bbl/day capacity, currently Saudi Arabia's main alternative to Hormuz). If Yanbu export terminals are also targeted: Saudi Arabia loses BOTH export routes. The energy war is no longer confined to the Gulf — it encompasses the entire Arabian Peninsula.

theoryEvaluation.title: Nowruz paradox — war + holiday + succession crisis
theoryEvaluation.body: March 20 = Nowruz (Persian New Year), the most important cultural event in Iran. War enters 4th week on this day with: no ceasefire (FM: 'never asked'), Mojtaba's condition uncertain (may miss Nowruz message), internet blackout 260+ hours, 5,400+ dead, 25+ provinces under bombardment. Pahlavi's call to celebrate Nowruz as 'national solidarity' = organized opposition using cultural moment. IRGC must simultaneously manage: (1) ongoing war operations, (2) Nowruz security (preventing gatherings → protests), (3) power transition if Mojtaba absent. This triple demand could expose IRGC capacity limits. If Mojtaba fails to appear: strongest signal yet that succession is not resolved.

theoryEvaluation.title: Diplomatic bifurcation — Macron moratorium vs Iran's total rejection
theoryEvaluation.body: Two contradictory diplomatic developments: (1) Macron calls energy moratorium (separating energy from military) — first concrete framework; (2) Iran FM: 'We never asked for ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation.' Iran's total rejection of diplomacy makes Macron's framework irrelevant UNLESS it leads to: (a) unilateral Gulf + Western de-escalation on energy targeting, or (b) pressure on US/Israel to avoid South Pars re-strike. But IRGC IS the party striking Gulf energy — and they reject all restraint. Result: Macron framework can only constrain one side. Meanwhile Trump's South Pars trigger (next Qatar attack = US destroys entire field) creates ESCALATORY linkage that contradicts Macron's de-escalatory intent.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سپاه: اجرای سیستماتیک لیست اهداف
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: سامرف = تأیید الگو. کویت ✓ قطر ✓ سامرف ✓. دریای سرخ = خط لوله شرق-غرب تهدید. اگر ینبع بندر هم: عربستان هر دو مسیر از دست.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: پارادوکس نوروز
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: نوروز + جنگ + بحران جانشینی. مجتبی غایب؟ پهلوی: همبستگی. سپاه: جنگ + نوروز + قدرت = سه فشار. ظرفیت محدود.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: دوگانگی دیپلماتیک
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ماکرون: توقف انرژی. اما عراقچی: 'هرگز.' ماکرون فقط یک طرف. ترامپ: پارس جنوبی = ماشه تشدید.

endstate.title: Most likely (47%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral — INCREASED. SAMREF hit = IRGC executing target list, Red Sea coast compromised, East-West Pipeline bypass threatened. 4 of 7 named targets in 48 hours. If Jubail/Al Hosn next: total Gulf shutdown, $130+ oil, Saudi entry. Iran permanently rejects diplomacy. Trump South Pars trigger = escalation ratchet. Macron moratorium cannot restrain IRGC. The question shifts from 'will IRGC hit more targets?' (yes) to 'can Gulf defenses stop the remaining 3?'

endstate.title: Second (18%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition — less likely. SAMREF execution = IRGC NOT reverting to harassment. For attrition: IRGC must pause after SAMREF, Gulf defenses must improve dramatically. Both unlikely given Araghchi's permanent rejection of talks.

endstate.title: Emerging (14%)
endstate.body: International intervention. Macron moratorium = first concrete framework. IMO corridor vote. Rafah reopened. Global economic urgency at $112+ oil. But: no Iranian partner. Most likely form: unilateral maritime corridor OR energy moratorium imposed on US/Israel side only.

endstate.title: Wild card (5%)
endstate.body: Nowruz internal unrest. Mojtaba absent + Pahlavi solidarity call + gatherings → protests = two-front IRGC crisis. OR: IRGC hits Jubail + Al Hosn simultaneously = oil $150+, total shutdown. OR: Trump South Pars trigger activated = US destroys Iran's largest gas field = total energy war. OR: Congress revolts on $200B+.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۷٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ تشدید — افزایش. سامرف = لیست اجرا. دریای سرخ = خط لوله تهدید. ۴ از ۷. جبیل = تعطیلی + ورود عربستان. ایران: 'هرگز.' سؤال: دفاع خلیج ۳ باقی؟

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۱۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی — بعیدتر. سامرف = تشدید نه آزار.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۴٪)
endstate_fa.body: ماکرون = چارچوب. IMO. رفح. اما بدون شریک ایرانی.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: نوروز اعتراض. جبیل + الحصن = ۱۵۰+. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. کنگره.

shippingRoutes.detail: Unchanged. IRGC executing target list — UAE next after Kuwait + Qatar + SAMREF. Qatar Airways suspended. Pegasus canceled until April 12. This route remains permanently dead.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed. NATO intercepted missiles over Turkey. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan functional but Turkey–Iran border shut. Swedish execution + Nowruz = no improvement.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Still most viable but declining. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment = Caspian/northern theater intensifying. Warships destroyed, fuel storage damaged. NOWRUZ may briefly affect border operations. IRGC controls logistics. Internet 260+ hours = communication barriers. Strikes reaching all 25 provinces.
Eastern borders not in main combat zone but Caspian strikes expanding. No infrastructure improvement. Assessment unchanged.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: سپاه لیست اجرا — امارات بعدی. قطرایرویز معلق. مرده.
بهترین اما کاهشی. بندرانزلی. نوروز = مرز؟ اینترنت ۲۶۰+. ۲۵ استان.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed. IRGC dictatorship = civilian economy subordinated. Nowruz = no reprieve.
Internet blackout: 260+ hours (11+ days). Total communications isolation. IRGC controls all channels. Nowruz messages going unsent.
Power outages: WORSENING. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets across 25 provinces. Bandar Anzali fuel storage damaged. Energy infrastructure targeted on BOTH sides — Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi + Iran.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Shahin Shahr + Caspian expansion. Nowruz under fire = unprecedented cultural trauma.
56+ cultural sites damaged. 5,400+ estimated dead. IRGC relocating to civilian spaces.
New title production: Effectively halted. Nowruz publishing season — normally peak — completely lost.

Assessment: Existential crisis. SAMREF hit = war widening geographically. Nowruz under bombardment = cultural devastation. Iran FM: 'never asked for ceasefire' = no end in sight. Recovery: years minimum.
publishingStatus_fa: اینترنت: ۲۶۰+ ساعت قطع. پیام‌های نوروزی ارسال نشده.
اصفهان + شیراز: بمباران. نوروز زیر آتش = تروما.
تولید متوقف. فصل نوروز = از دست رفته.
بحران وجودی. سامرف = گسترش. عراقچی: 'هرگز.' سال‌ها.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. IRGC executing target list across Gulf. Qatar Airways suspended. No improvement possible.

BEST ALTERNATIVE DECLINING FURTHER: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) — viability 10-15%. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment + Caspian expansion + Nowruz border disruption. IRGC dictatorship = civilian logistics subordinated.
SUPPLY SOURCE CRITICAL: CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces. Nowruz under bombardment = unprecedented. 5,400+ dead. Internet 260+ hrs. No civilian economic channel.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. IRGC dictatorship formalized + Araghchi permanent rejection = compliance tightening further. Swedish execution fallout.
FINANCIAL: Rial collapsed. Brent ~$112. SAMREF hit = no Saudi energy safe. IRGC controls economy completely.
WINDOW CLOSED: IRGC executing named targets. SAMREF = Red Sea coast reached. FM: 'never asked for ceasefire.' No diplomatic off-ramp. Nowruz lost. Plan for 12+ month total interruption.
